mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volunteer (username, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, id_card, avatar, province, city, district, total_hours, points, certification_status, wallet_address, status, detailed_address, latitude, longitude) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{idCard}, #{avatar}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{totalHours}, #{points}, #{certificationStatus}, #{walletAddress}, #{status}, #{detailedAddress}, #{latitude}, #{longitude})
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer SET total_hours = 0, points = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE phone = #{phone}

SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer WHERE wallet_address IS NOT NULL AND wallet_address != ''

SELECT id, username, password, real_name as realName, gender, phone, email, id_card as idCard, avatar, province, city, district, detailed_address as detailedAddress, latitude, longitude, total_hours as totalHours, points, certification_status as certificationStatus, wallet_address as walletAddress, status, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM volunteer WHERE wallet_address IS NOT NULL AND wallet_address != '' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer SET points = #{points} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE volunteer SET total_hours = #{hours} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM volunteer ORDER BY id
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(service_hours) FROM activity_checkin WHERE status = 2 AND is_counted = 1) + (SELECT SUM(hours) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE status = '已通过'), 0 ) AS total_hours
